headline: 影视圈热度不减，多部新作蓄势待发
headlineEn: Entertainment Industry Heats Up with New Releases on the Horizon
summary: 今日无新片上映，但《痴迷》《正相反的你与我》等剧集热度飙升。《福尔摩斯小姐3》《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》等备受期待。
summaryEn: No new movies today, but shows like Obsession and You & I Are Opposite are trending. Highly anticipated titles include Enola Holmes 3 and Spider-Man: Freshman Year.

topTrends.title: 无职转生：到了异世界就拿出真本事

industryHighlights.text: 《福尔摩斯小姐3》本周热度飙升，续集备受期待。
industryHighlights.en: Enola Holmes 3 surges in trending this week, sequel highly anticipated.

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》即将上映，漫威粉丝翘首以盼。
industryHighlights.en: Spider-Man: Freshman Year coming soon, Marvel fans eager.

industryHighlights.text: 《玩具总动员5》位列本周趋势，经典IP再续新篇。
industryHighlights.en: Toy Story 5 trends this week, classic IP returns.
